name: budgie-breeding-tracker-promo
description: BudgieBreedingTracker promotional video built with Remotion

scripts.render:tr: remotion render src/index.ts PromoVideo-TR out/promo-tr.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18
scripts.render:en: remotion render src/index.ts PromoVideo-EN out/promo-en.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18
scripts.render:all: npm run render:tr && npm run render:en
scripts.render:hq:tr: remotion render src/index.ts PromoVideo-TR out/promo-tr-hq.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 14 --image-format png
scripts.render:hq:en: remotion render src/index.ts PromoVideo-EN out/promo-en-hq.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 14 --image-format png
